title: Update README leaderboard for April records
author: cocohearts
body:
## Summary

Updates the README leaderboard for the merged / expected April 10min_16mb record sequence:

- PR #1204: Parallel Residuals + Mini Depth Recurrence, 1.1063
- PR #1218: 4096-Vocab + Larger Model + High WD + Simplifications, 1.0979
- PR #1285: MuonEq-R + Depth Recurrence + WD=0.090 + All-Int6 GPTQ, 1.0912
- PR #1334: SP4096 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + MuonEq-R, 1.0897
- PR #1394: SP8192 + GPTQ Embeddings + Depth Recurrence + SDClip, 1.0856
- PR #1413: SP8192 + QK-Gain 5 + Legal Score-First TTT, 1.0828
- PR #1477: SP8192 + Parallel Residuals + Score-First TTT, 1.0822
- PR #1493: SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + Legal TTT, 1.0810

Each new row follows the existing leaderboard summary format: `On PR #...: ...` plus the brief incremental contribution.

## Validation

- Rebased on current `origin/main` after PRs #1413, #1477, and #1493 landed; their record folders are now present on main.
- Ran a parser over the README leaderboard table and verified all table rows have the expected 6 markdown-table columns.
- Verified README-only diff.
